description_long: This object is a detailed model of the NASA Space Shuttle, featuring a white orbiter attached to a large orange external fuel tank and two slender white solid rocket boosters. The orbiter has a distinctive black nose, black wing edges, and a vertical stabilizer with a black tip. The external tank is cylindrical with a pointed conical top and is flanked by the two boosters, each with black banding and a ribbed lower section. The wings of the orbiter are delta-shaped and extend outward, with the tail fin rising above the main body. The overall structure is streamlined for atmospheric and space flight, with visible engine nozzles at the rear of the orbiter.
description: A NASA Space Shuttle with a white orbiter, orange external tank, and two white solid rocket boosters, featuring black accents and a streamlined, aerodynamic design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the orange external tank, one white solid rocket booster, and the orbiter's black-tipped tail and wing.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the pointed orange tank, both white boosters, and the orbiter's nose and delta wings.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the external tank, the other solid rocket booster, and the orbiter's wing and tail visible.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying both solid rocket boosters, the external tank, and the orbiter's black engine nozzles and tail fin.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing delta configuration with straight leading edges and no visible winglets; wings are integrated into the orbiter's lower fuselage.
attribute_engine_type: Three rear-mounted rocket engines on the orbiter, with two additional solid rocket boosters attached externally.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and integrated horizontal stabilizers at the rear of the orbiter.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable tricycle landing gear, with main gear under the wings and a nose gear under the forward fuselage (not visible in these images but standard for this design).
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit at the front of the orbiter with multiple windows, suitable for a multi-seat crew.
